metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the last30daysYT YouTube newsletter-generator skill.

plugins.name: last30daysYT
plugins.description: Topic-first YouTube newsletter generator: engagement-ranks the best videos on a topic from the last 30 days, transcribes them via yt2md, and writes a skimmable, educational newsletter (Markdown + HTML with a chart + PDF). Optionally follows a standing channel list. Any language.
